Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. WolfIP: Lightweight TCP/IP stack with no dynamic memory allocations 59 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. Dolphin Progress Release 2603 265 upvotes, 44 comments
  3. The Met Releases High-Def 3D Scans of 140 Famous Art Objects 149 upvotes, 31 comments
  4. Italian prosecutors seek trial for Amazon, 4 execs in alleged $1.4B tax evasion 205 upvotes, 54 comments
  5. Reversing memory loss via gut-brain communication 137 upvotes, 35 comments
  6. DDR4 Sdram – Initialization, Training and Calibration 39 upvotes, 7 comments
  7. Long Overlooked as Crucial to Life, Fungi Start to Get Their Due 59 upvotes, 13 comments
  8. Malus – Clean Room as a Service 837 upvotes, 327 comments
  9. Show HN: Understudy – Teach a desktop agent by demonstrating a task once 54 upvotes, 14 comments
  10. Bubble Sorted Amen Break 175 upvotes, 63 comments
  11. Runners Are Discovering It's Surprisingly Easy to Churn Butter on Their Runs 26 upvotes, 5 comments
  12. The Emotional Labor Behind AI Intimacy (2025) [pdf] 44 upvotes, 14 comments
  13. Show HN: OneCLI – Vault for AI Agents in Rust 85 upvotes, 34 comments
  14. Full Spectrum and Infrared Photography 36 upvotes, 12 comments
  15. Launch HN: IonRouter (YC W26) – High-throughput, low-cost inference 24 upvotes, 7 comments
  16. An old photo of a large BBS (2022) 102 upvotes, 52 comments
  17. The Cost of Indirection in Rust 63 upvotes, 30 comments
  18. Apple's MacBook Neo makes repairs easier and cheaper than other MacBooks 135 upvotes, 76 comments
  19. Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations 142 upvotes, 85 comments
  20. Show HN: Rudel – Claude Code Session Analytics 118 upvotes, 72 comments
  21. Show HN: Axe – A 12MB binary that replaces your AI framework 105 upvotes, 70 comments
  22. The Biggest Identity Sandpiles and How to Compute Them 16 upvotes, 6 comments
  23. Kotlin creator's new language: talk to LLMs in specs, not English 251 upvotes, 213 comments
  24. Big data on the cheapest MacBook 251 upvotes, 233 comments
  25. ATMs didn't kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did 226 upvotes, 276 comments
  26. Are LLM merge rates not getting better? 77 upvotes, 86 comments
  27. Bringing Chrome to ARM64 Linux Devices 10 upvotes, 6 comments
  28. The Road Not Taken: A World Where IPv4 Evolved 31 upvotes, 50 comments
  29. US private credit defaults hit record 9.2% in 2025, Fitch says 135 upvotes, 286 comments
  30. Converge (YC S23) Is Hiring a Founding Platform Engineer (NYC, Onsite) 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 5:00am, 13 March 2026. Source here.
